summary: Predictive Safety Reroute (Phase 44) - All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend EmergencyMap reroute-suggestion-card verified with approve/dismiss buttons. FamilyDashboard SSE handlers for safety_reroute_suggestion and safety_reroute_approved confirmed. OSRM uses public fallback since local OSRM not running.

backend_api.POST /api/reroute/suggest (with destinat: PASS - Returns suggested/no_alternatives/no_improvement based on OSRM routes
backend_api.POST /api/reroute/suggest (without desti: PASS - Returns 400 when no destination or active route
backend_api.GET /api/reroute/history (returns list): PASS - Returns suggestions array with count
backend_api.GET /api/reroute/history (fields): PASS - Includes suggestion_id, user_id, trigger_risk_score, trigger_risk_level, trigger_type, reason, status, created_at
backend_api.Safety Brain auto-trigger: PASS - POST /api/safety-brain/evaluate with dangerous+ signals calls on_risk_level_change hook
backend_api.Route safety scoring: PASS - Returns safety_details with incident_proximity, safe_zone_distance, time_of_day_risk, efficiency_penalty

frontend_ui.nav-emergency-map: PASS - Emergency Map nav link in sidebar
frontend_ui.reroute-suggestion-card: CODE VERIFIED - Shows when rerouteSuggestion state is set (via SSE)
frontend_ui.reroute line layer: CODE VERIFIED - Draws dashed green line on map when suggestion active

sse_handlers.safety_reroute_suggestion: IMPLEMENTED - Toast warning, setRerouteSuggestion state update in FamilyDashboard
sse_handlers.safety_reroute_approved: IMPLEMENTED - Toast success, clears rerouteSuggestion state

critical_code_review_comments: Reroute suggestion service correctly implements 4-factor safety scoring formula
Auto-trigger threshold set to 0.6 (dangerous level) via on_risk_level_change hook in safety_brain_service.py line 202-206
120s cooldown enforced per user via Redis/in-memory fallback
OSRM public router (router.project-osrm.org) used as fallback - returns limited alternatives for some routes
EmergencyMap correctly renders reroute-suggestion-card with approve/dismiss buttons when SSE event received
Reroute line drawn as dashed green LineString on map (line-dasharray: [3, 2])
SSE broadcasts safety_reroute_suggestion to user and operators when suggestion created
SSE broadcasts safety_reroute_approved when guardian approves route
Approve/dismiss buttons make API calls and invoke onRerouteAction callback
seed_data_creation: Multiple reroute suggestions created during testing with Bangalore and NYC coordinates. Some approved, some dismissed via API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Predictive Safety Reroute (Phase 44) fully tested. Backend: POST /reroute/suggest (manual trigger), POST /reroute/{id}/approve, POST /reroute/{id}/dismiss, GET /reroute/history. Safety Brain auto-trigger at dangerous+ (>= 0.6) via on_risk_level_change hook. OSRM public fallback used - may return only 1 route for some coords (returns 'no_alternatives'). Bangalore coords (12.9716,77.5946 → 12.9352,77.6245) or NYC (-74.006,40.7128 → -73.935,40.730) return 2+ routes. 120s cooldown per user. Frontend: EmergencyMap shows reroute-suggestion-card with approve-reroute-btn/dismiss-reroute-btn when rerouteSuggestion state is set via SSE. FamilyDashboard handles safety_reroute_suggestion/approved SSE events.

mocked_apis_list: OSRM uses public fallback (router.project-osrm.org) since local OSRM not running - NOT mocked, uses real external service

verified_features.suggest_endpoint: Working - Computes safer route alternatives via OSRM, scores with 4-factor formula
verified_features.approve_endpoint: Working - Updates suggestion status to 'approved', broadcasts SSE
verified_features.history_endpoint: Working - Returns past suggestions list with all fields, respects limit
verified_features.cooldown_enforcement: Working - 429 returned within 120s of last suggestion
verified_features.safety_brain_hook: Working - on_risk_level_change called at dangerous+ levels
verified_features.route_scoring: Working - Returns safety_details with all 4 components
verified_features.sse_safety_reroute_suggestion: Implemented - Broadcasts to user and operators
verified_features.frontend_reroute_card: Implemented - Shows reason, risks, distance, ETA, safety details
verified_features.frontend_reroute_line: Implemented - Dashed green line on map for suggested route
